# Banking System

A modern, TypeScript-based banking application with a responsive UI built using CSS and JavaScript. The system provides comprehensive banking functionalities with a clean, intuitive interface deployed on Vercel.

**Tech Stack:**
- TypeScript: 92.1%
- CSS: 7.5%
- JavaScript: 0.4%

[View Live Demo](https://banking-system-kappa-six.vercel.app)
